selection_query: AC OPF uncertainty formulation baseline metrics case study
required_evidence_packet: assumptions, variables, constraints, and solution flow
test systems, scenarios, baselines, metrics with units, and boundary tests
write_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-writing with references/published-paper-reconstruction.md to reconstruct a TPWRS-style manuscript argument from the evidence packet only.
review_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-review to judge whether the reconstructed argument would meet TPWRS review strength without access to the source prose.
pass_criteria: The draft has a reviewable formulation object, coherent assumptions and variables, relevant baselines, metric-supported conclusions, and no copied or source-like wording.
section_level_only_when: Only case-analysis data, tables, or figures are available without enough model and method facts.

selection_query: distributed voltage control communication delay baseline voltage violation
required_evidence_packet: metrics with units and result direction
claim boundary for communication, privacy, data, or scalability
write_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-writing with references/published-paper-reconstruction.md to reconstruct an IEEE TSG case-study section from the evidence packet only.
review_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-review to review whether the section ties smart-grid evidence to grid operation and avoids unsupported data, communication, privacy, or scalability claims.
pass_criteria: The section states system, scenario, baseline, metric direction, grid-operational interpretation, and bounded conclusion.
section_level_only_when: The evidence packet lacks the full formulation, algorithm, or literature gap needed for a full paper.

selection_query: engineering mechanism model validation power system case study
write_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-writing with references/published-paper-reconstruction.md to reconstruct a CSEE-style technical argument from the evidence packet only.
review_prompt: Use $powerlit-power-systems-paper-review to check whether the output has a mechanism-model-evidence chain rather than policy background or broad engineering value.
pass_criteria: The output defines the engineering mechanism, keeps equations close to physical meaning, and uses case evidence to verify the stated mechanism.
section_level_only_when: Only numerical case data are available without model construction details.
